name: Amercoat 235 Epoxy Mastic
description: Surface-tolerant epoxy mastic for steel with minimal surface preparation requirements. Excellent adhesion to tight rust, old coatings, and mill scale. Used for maintenance of bridges, tanks, and structural steel in moderate corrosive environments.

name: Amercoat 240 Surface Tolerant Epoxy
description: Two-component epoxy for marginally prepared surfaces. Wets out and adheres to tight rust and minimally cleaned steel. Suitable for maintenance painting of existing structures where blast cleaning is not feasible.

name: Amercoat 385 Epoxy
description: Two-component polyamide epoxy primer and finish coat for steel and concrete. Provides excellent corrosion protection, adhesion, and chemical resistance in moderate industrial environments. Widely used in oil and gas and water treatment.

name: Amercoat 400 Epoxy
description: High-build two-component epoxy for industrial steel and concrete. Provides superior corrosion protection and chemical resistance. Used for tanks, vessels, piping, and structural steel in chemical and petrochemical environments.

name: Amercoat 450H HS Epoxy
description: High-solids two-component epoxy topcoat for demanding industrial service. Excellent chemical and abrasion resistance with reduced VOC from high solids content. Used as a finish coat over epoxy primer systems in severe environments.

name: Amercoat 68 HS Epoxy
description: High-solids polyamide epoxy primer and intermediate coat for steel. Provides excellent corrosion resistance and adhesion as part of multi-coat systems for bridges, offshore platforms, and industrial structures.

name: Amercoat 391 Novolac Epoxy
description: Novolac epoxy for severe chemical service including exposure to concentrated acids, caustics, and aromatic solvents. Excellent chemical and abrasion resistance at elevated temperatures up to 250°F. Used in chemical processing and tank lining.

name: Amercoat 78HB Coal Tar Epoxy
description: High-build coal tar epoxy for immersion service and buried steel. Provides outstanding moisture and cathodic disbondment resistance for underground pipelines, pilings, ballast tanks, and water storage structures.

name: Sigmaguard 750
description: Chemical-resistant epoxy lining for steel tanks and vessels in aggressive service including acids, caustics, and solvents. Provides high-build protection with excellent adhesion and chemical resistance for demanding industrial environments.

name: Sigmacover 256
description: Two-component polyamide epoxy primer and finish for steel and concrete in moderate industrial environments. Good corrosion protection, adhesion, and chemical resistance. Widely used in marine and industrial maintenance programs.

name: Sigmacover 300
description: High-build two-component epoxy for industrial steel and concrete. Provides excellent corrosion and chemical resistance as primer or intermediate in multi-coat systems. Used in offshore, power generation, and petrochemical facilities.

name: Sigmacover 410
description: Solvent-free two-component epoxy for concrete and steel floors in severe service environments. 100% solids formulation for immersion-grade protection with zero VOC. Used in chemical plants, offshore platforms, and secondary containment.

name: Sigmacover 522
description: Glass flake-reinforced epoxy for immersion and severe atmospheric service. The glass flake barrier significantly extends moisture permeation path for outstanding corrosion protection on tanks, splash zones, and offshore structures.

name: Sigmashield 820
description: Heavy-duty glass flake epoxy for immersion and severe splash/spillage service. Provides maximum barrier protection for ship hulls, offshore structures, and tanks in aggressive chemical environments. Multiple coats build thick film in fewer applications.

name: Sigmaline 280
description: Epoxy lining system for oil and gas transmission pipelines. Provides corrosion and chemical protection for the internal surface of carbon steel pipe. Smooth finish reduces friction for improved flow efficiency.

name: Sigmaline 410
description: Solvent-free epoxy pipeline lining for potable water contact and aggressive chemical service. Provides excellent protection with no solvent entrapment in thick film builds. Suitable for pump casings, valves, and fittings.

name: Dimetcote 6 Inorganic Zinc
description: Post-cure inorganic zinc-rich primer for structural steel providing galvanic corrosion protection. Industry standard shop primer for bridges, tanks, and structural fabrications. Zinc content >85% by weight in dry film.

name: Dimetcote 9 Inorganic Zinc
description: Self-curing inorganic zinc primer that cures with atmospheric moisture without a post-cure water mist. Suitable for field application. Provides galvanic zinc protection on structural steel for bridges, tanks, and offshore structures.

name: Amercoat 370 Organic Zinc
description: Organic zinc-rich primer for corrosion protection of structural steel. Compatible with epoxy and urethane topcoats. Suitable for shop or field application where inorganic zinc cure conditions cannot be met.

name: Sigmazinc 102
description: Two-component epoxy zinc-rich primer for structural steel. Provides galvanic protection with good compatibility across a wide range of topcoat systems. Used as primer in multi-coat systems for marine, offshore, and industrial structures.

name: Amercoat 68 HS Zinc
description: High-solids zinc-rich epoxy primer providing cathodic protection with reduced solvent and VOC. Suitable for shop and field application as a primer in multi-coat systems for industrial and marine structures.

name: Amerethane 450 HS Urethane
description: High-solids two-component aliphatic polyurethane topcoat with excellent UV stability and colour retention. Premium topcoat for bridges, tanks, and structures exposed to aggressive UV and weathering. Exceptional long-term appearance retention.

name: Amercoat 450 Polyurethane
description: Two-component aliphatic polyurethane topcoat providing excellent gloss retention and UV stability. Used as a final coat over epoxy systems in industrial and architectural applications requiring long-term colour durability.

name: Sigmadur 550 Aliphatic Urethane
description: Premium two-component aliphatic polyurethane topcoat with superior UV stability and gloss retention for long-term aesthetics. Recommended for demanding offshore, bridge, and infrastructure applications requiring extended maintenance cycles.

name: Sigmadur 520 Aliphatic Urethane
description: Two-component aliphatic polyurethane semi-gloss finish coat providing good UV resistance and chemical protection at an economical price point. Used over epoxy primers in industrial maintenance programs.

name: PPG Fluoropon Fluoropolymer
description: PVDF fluoropolymer topcoat providing maximum UV resistance and colour retention for architectural metal. Used on aluminium curtain wall, cladding, and exterior metal surfaces requiring 20+ year colour stability. Factory-applied finish.

name: Amercoat 370 Epoxy Mastic
description: Surface-tolerant two-component epoxy mastic for steel requiring minimal surface preparation. Provides excellent adhesion over tight rust and existing coatings. Used for maintenance painting where thorough blast cleaning is not possible.

name: Devguard 4160 Alkyd Primer
description: Alkyd rust inhibitive primer for ferrous metals. Contains zinc chromate-free corrosion inhibitors for protection of steel in moderate industrial and commercial environments. Compatible with alkyd and many acrylic topcoats.

name: Devguard 4379 DTM Alkyd
description: Direct-to-metal alkyd coating providing both priming and finishing properties for steel and iron in light industrial environments. Good adhesion, corrosion resistance, and durability in a single-coat application.

name: Interzone 954
description: High-solids epoxy for splash zone and immersion service on offshore structures. Excellent resistance to seawater immersion, splash/splash zone exposure, and cathodic disbondment. Used on offshore platforms, jetties, and marine structures.

name: Interzinc 52
description: Waterborne inorganic zinc primer for structural steel providing galvanic protection. Self-curing with atmospheric moisture for easy field application. Low VOC suitable for areas with stringent solvent restrictions.

name: PPG Hi-Temp 1027
description: Single-component silicone high temperature coating for surfaces operating up to 1027°F (553°C). Used on stacks, boilers, furnaces, and high-temperature process equipment requiring oxidation and corrosion protection at extreme temperatures.

name: PPG Hi-Temp 500
description: Silicone-alkyd high temperature coating for service up to 500°F (260°C). Provides corrosion protection and colour retention on piping, tanks, and equipment at elevated operating temperatures. Air dry or force cure.

name: Amercoat 738 Antifouling
description: Self-polishing copolymer antifouling coating for ship hulls and submerged marine structures. Provides controlled biocide release to prevent fouling organism attachment and reduces hull friction drag for fuel savings.

name: PPG DIAMOND Interior Flat
description: PPG's premium interior flat paint with zero VOC and exceptional hide. Self-priming formula with advanced stain resistance and washability for the most demanding residential and commercial interior applications.

name: PPG DIAMOND Interior Eggshell
description: PPG's premium interior eggshell with zero VOC and superior washability. Provides a smooth low-sheen finish with excellent colour richness and resistance to scrubbing for walls in living areas and bedrooms.

name: PPG DIAMOND Interior Satin
description: PPG's premium interior satin with zero VOC and outstanding washability for kitchen and bath surfaces. Provides a smooth, lightly sheen finish with superior stain resistance and durability for high-traffic areas.

name: PPG DIAMOND Interior Semi-Gloss
description: PPG's premium semi-gloss interior paint with zero VOC for trim, doors, and accent walls. Highly washable and scrubbable finish with outstanding stain resistance and moisture resistance for kitchens and bathrooms.

name: PPG TIMELESS Interior
description: Self-priming premium interior paint with zero VOC and outstanding hide that covers in one coat in most situations. Advanced formula provides excellent washability, stain resistance, and colour consistency across all sheen levels.

name: PPG TIMELESS Exterior
description: Premium 100% acrylic exterior paint with outstanding UV resistance, colour retention, and durability. Self-priming formula with excellent hide for wood, hardboard, stucco, and masonry. Resists fading, mildew, and weathering.

name: PPG BREAK-THROUGH Waterborne Alkyd
description: Waterborne alkyd for doors, trim, and cabinets providing the hard durable finish of oil-based paint with the easy cleanup of latex. Excellent levelling eliminates brush marks for a smooth factory-like finish. Low VOC with fast recoat.

name: PPG SEAL GRIP Primer
description: Interior and exterior bonding primer that adheres to glossy and difficult surfaces including tile, glass, PVC, and painted metal without sanding. Excellent stain blocking and adhesion for problem substrates.

name: PPG SPEEDHIDE Pro EV Zero VOC
description: Professional contractor interior zero VOC paint with excellent hide, coverage, and fast dry time. Designed for high-production painting in commercial and residential projects. Minimal odour makes it suitable for occupied spaces.

name: PPG SPEEDHIDE Interior
description: Reliable contractor-grade interior acrylic latex providing excellent coverage and hide for production painting. A trusted staple for residential and commercial painting contractors balancing performance and economy.

name: PPG SPEEDHIDE Exterior
description: Contractor-grade 100% acrylic exterior latex providing reliable weather resistance, hide, and adhesion. A production-focused exterior paint for residential and light commercial projects at a contractor price point.

name: PPG Manor Hall Exterior
description: Premium 100% acrylic exterior paint with outstanding UV resistance, flexibility, and hide. Provides long-lasting protection for wood, stucco, fibre cement, and masonry siding. Excellent adhesion and mildew resistance.

name: PPG Sun-Proof Exterior
description: 100% acrylic exterior paint formulated for superior UV resistance and colour retention. Excellent flexibility, adhesion, and mildew resistance for wood, hardboard, and stucco in all climate conditions.

name: Pitt-Tech Plus DTM Industrial
description: Direct-to-metal industrial acrylic coating functioning as both primer and topcoat for ferrous and non-ferrous metals. Excellent rust inhibition, adhesion, and durability for maintenance painting of structural steel and equipment.

name: Pitt-Tech One Pack DTM
description: One-component DTM industrial coating with the performance of a two-component system. Rust inhibitive formula for steel and iron in light to moderate industrial environments. Fast drying for quick return to service.

name: Amerlock 400 Epoxy Floor
description: Two-component epoxy floor coating for concrete in warehouses, manufacturing plants, and commercial facilities. Provides excellent adhesion, abrasion resistance, and chemical resistance with a durable easy-to-clean finish.

name: PPG Floor Coat Epoxy
description: Two-component 100% solids epoxy floor system for concrete providing excellent abrasion and chemical resistance. High-gloss decorative finish with outstanding durability for retail, commercial, and light industrial floors.

name: Pitthane Ultra Urethane Floor
description: Waterborne aliphatic polyurethane floor finish for concrete and wood floors requiring a decorative durable surface. Excellent abrasion resistance, UV stability, and chemical resistance for commercial and institutional floors.
